info.name: Customer Auth API
info.description: End-customer authentication, onboarding, wallet transfers (IFRS double-entry), banners, services catalog, and notifications for Fast Pay SoftPOS (`/api/v1/customer`). Dev OTP mock: set `OTP_MOCK_CODE=111111`. Refresh-token accepts valid JWT or tokens expired within `JWT_REFRESH_GRACE` (default 7d). Wallet E2E fixtures: run `php artisan db:seed --class=WalletE2eSeeder`.

request.description: Public list of active countries for profile completion.
Cities for a country dial code (e.g. 249).
Sends OTP via SMS. Dev: check Laravel logs for code when SMS is stubbed.

response.name: Error
Error
Error

request.description: Run Send SMS OTP → Verify OTP first.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Registration successful",
    "data": {
        "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.example",
        "token_type": "Bearer",
        "profile_completed": true,
        "customer": {
            "id": 1,
            "name": "Ahmed",

request.description: Issues a new JWT using a valid customer token or one expired within JWT_REFRESH_GRACE (default 7d, same as JWT_EXPIRES_IN). No request body.

request.description: Multipart form-data. Profile picture (`picture` file field) is optional. Sends welcome email on success. Use `{{dev_url}}` instead of `{{base_url}}` for the dev server.

formdata.description: Optional — omit to keep existing picture

request.description: Update profile data only (no email or phone). Does not send welcome email. Picture is optional. Use `{{dev_url}}` instead of `{{base_url}}` for the dev server.

request.description: Active advertisements for the customer country (reuses merchant-user advertisement listing logic).
Full customer catalog: categories -> services -> products -> product_forms -> fields. Same payload shape as merchant `/api/v1/merchant/services/catalog`.
Home-screen subset with quick_action. Same payload shape as merchant `/api/v1/merchant/services/home`.
Single service with products and form fields. Run Services Catalog (Full) first to populate `service_id`.

response.name: Error

request.description: Returns current wallet balance, available balance, currency, status, and the most recent wallet transaction.

header.description: Optional. Replays return the same response without double-spending.

request.description: Send money to another customer wallet by public wallet_id. Sender must be active with sufficient balance; recipient must be active.

response.name: Success
Insufficient balance

request.description: Send money by recipient phone number. Resolves phone -> customer -> wallet automatically.

response.name: Success
